message:
charmed_rust-n9k: Add keyboard navigation and search to glow

Adds comprehensive keyboard navigation and search functionality:

Navigation:
- j/k, arrows: line-by-line scrolling
- d/u: half-page scrolling
- f/b, pgup/pgdn, space: full-page scrolling
- g/G: jump to top/bottom (via viewport)

Search:
- /: forward search
- ?: backward search
- n/N: next/previous match
- Incremental search with match highlighting
- Match counter in status bar

Help overlay:
- h or ?: show keyboard shortcuts overlay
- Any key to dismiss

Also adds InputMode state machine (Normal/Help/Search) and
SearchState for tracking query and matches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
